title: Ross County relegated again? Or will Airdrie or Morton face drop?
summary: Scottish Championship sides Morton, Airdrieonians, and Ross County face relegation to League 1 on the final Friday of the season, with the outcome to be decided in this critical round of matches. The stakes are at their highest as one or more of these teams will drop down.
content: It's relegation judgement night on the final Friday of the Scottish Championship season proper, with Morton, Airdrieonians and Ross County all at risk of being sucked into League 1 before the night is out.

zh.title: 罗斯郡再次降级？埃尔德里或莫顿将面临降级？
zh.summary: 苏格兰冠军联赛的莫顿、埃尔德里和罗斯郡在赛季最后一个周五面临降入第一级联赛的可能，比赛结果将在这关键一轮中决出。这些球队中的一支或多支将下降。

title: Mainoo signs new Man Utd deal until 2031
summary: Kobbie Mainoo has signed a new Manchester United contract extending through 2031. The midfielder's extension signals the club's long-term confidence in his development.
content: Kobbie Mainoo signs a new contract with Manchester United that will keep him at Old Trafford until 2031.

zh.title: 梅努签新曼联合同至2031年

title: What's on the line as WSL reaches business end?
summary: With only a handful of games remaining, the Women's Super League title, European qualification, relegation, and promotion remain undecided. BBC Sport examines the high stakes as the season reaches its climactic phase.
content: BBC Sport analyses the state of play in the Women's Super League with only a handful of games to go and the title, European qualification, relegation and promotion still to be decided.

zh.title: 当女超联赛进入收官阶段时，什么处于危险中？

title: Burnley want Bellamy after Parker leaves
summary: Burnley is targeting Craig Bellamy as their next manager following Scott Parker's departure after relegation from the Premier League. Bellamy is being considered as the leading candidate to rebuild the club.
content: Burnley are interested in appointing Craig Bellamy as manager after Scott Parker leaves following relegation from the Premier League.

zh.title: 伯恩利在帕克离职后锁定贝拉米

title: Inspiring being part of Arsenal squad - Blackstenius
summary: Arsenal forward Stina Blackstenius has extended her contract and expressed her commitment to the club's Champions League ambitions. Her decision reflects her confidence in the squad's potential for success.
content: Forward Stina Blackstenius talks about Arsenal's Women's Champions League hopes and explains why she has extended her stay with the club.

title: Former England defender Young to retire aged 40
summary: Ashley Young will retire from professional football at season's end after a 23-year career, concluding his final years at Ipswich. The former England defender is ending a distinguished playing career.
content: Ashley Young will end his playing career at Ipswich after saying it will be "23 years and out" at the end of this season.

title: Pochettino sad to see Spurs suffering

title: England captain Williamson signs new Arsenal deal

content: Manager Marc Skinner says he has "no doubts" that he remains the best man for the job at Manchester United, despite criticism from fans.

content: Manchester United's Mason Mount feels the club can end their 13-year wait for a Premier League title next season.

content: Shakhtar Donetsk go into their Uefa Conference League semi-final tie against Crystal Palace on Thursday hoping to make their country proud.

title: Atléti-Arsenal draw shows that neither team is lik...

content: Arsenal and Atlético Madrid couldn't match Bayern and PSG's attacking firepower, though their UCL semifinal tie remains finely poised.

title: Ranking the top 20 best women's soccer club managers in the world

content: ESPN ranks the top 20 women's managers in the club game. Who's No. 1? And how will the NWSL, WSL, Liga F and other leagues be represented?

content: Arsenal close the gap on leaders Manchester City to eight points with two games in hand, after a 7-0 win over Leicester City - who will finish bottom of the Women's Super League.
